suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update services.yaml to include PROXY_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY_PATH for the proxy start command.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features proxy-node-b-routing-and-sandbox-service and proxy-live-channel-and-user-context noted that the proxy service in services.yaml is missing this environment variable, which could break local development.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow workers to write tests and implementation simultaneously when scaffolding new packages instead of strictly writing failing tests first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature sandbox-placeholder-http-ws-surface deviated from 'write failing tests first' procedure when scaffolding the new package.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker generated specific library documentation file (.factory/library/proxy-bootstrap-auth-gating.md).
